title: Whale (disambiguation)
content:
'''Whale''' may refer to one of the following:

=='''Canon'''==
[[File:AhhavVengefulSurvivor-SWZ.png|thumb|200px|Purrgil was a whale species capable of [[hyperspace]] travel.]]
'''[[Whale]]''', a type of creature that existed across the [[The galaxy|galaxy]]
*'''[[Purrgil]]''', a massive whale that could travel through [[hyperspace]]
**[[Purrgil Ultra|'''Purrgil Ultra''']], a sub-species of the purrgils
*'''[[Aiwha]]''', also known as the '''air whale'''
*'''[[Cartusion whale]]''', a whale species
*'''[[Razorback whale]]''', a type of [[Water|aquatic]] whale that lived in the [[coral]] reefs of [[Lew'el]]
*'''[[Ruhau-whale]]''', an animal found on [[Utapau]]
*'''[[Squid-whale]]''', a creature sustained within some [[exogorth]]s
*'''[[Starwhale]]''', an oceanic creature found on [[Uthura]]
*'''[[Tibidon sand whale]]''', a huge creature on [[Tatooine]]
*'''[[Whale-ship]]''', an organic living creature that [[Doctor]] [[Cylo]] utilized as his [[Cylo's base|research base]] and [[Cylo's whale fleet|fleet]]

=='''Legends'''==
==='''Creatures'''===
*[[Aiwha/Legends|'''Aiwha''']], also known as the '''air whale'''
*[[Cartusion whale/Legends|'''Cartusion whale''']], a whale species in the [[Cartusio system/Legends|Cartusio system]]
*'''[[Gulletbeast]]''', a whale-like [[Water/Legends|aquatic]] creature on [[Lamaredd/Legends|Lamaredd]]
*[[Hoth whale|'''Hoth whale''']], a species of [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]] whales that dwelled in the [[Ocean/Legends|sea]] of [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]
*[[Naboo whale|'''Naboo whale''']], an aquatic creature native to the southernmost oceans of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]
*[[Nus Whale|'''Nus Whale''']], a creature native to [[Dorumaa]]
*[[Ruhau-whale/Legends|'''Ruhau-whale''']], an animal found on [[Utapau/Legends|Utapau]]
*'''[[Trogwhale]]''', a species of horned animals from [[Kintan/Legends|Kintan]]
*[[Whaladon/Legends|'''Whaladon''']], a large sentient [[Mammal/Legends|mammal]] native to the oceans of [[Dac/Legends|Dac]]
*'''[[Whale-drake]]''', a whale species native to the [[Sivorian Sea|Sea]] of [[Sivoria]]

==='''Vehicles'''===
*'''''[[EAV Bothan Whale]]''''', a [[trans-oceanic shuttle]]

{{Disambig}}
